Defendants Kr 100 Hooper Llc And Kilroy Realty L.P. Notice Of Motion And Motion For Attorneys Fees
Off Calendar Apr-25-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANTS KR 100 HOOPER, LLC, KILROY REALTY, L.P.'S MOTION FOR ATTORNEYS FEES.

Appearances: Matthew S. Kahn of Gibson Dunn & Crutcher LLP (415.393.8212) for plaintiff and responding party; Michael J. Betz of Allen Matkins (415.273.7453) for defendants and moving parties.

Argued and the Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: DENIED. While moving party partially obtained the relief sought by its petition to compel arbitration, it is not the prevailing party in this action or proceeding. Recovery of fees under CC 1717 and Section 7 of the Contract is premature. Acosta v. Kerrigan (2007) 150 Cal.App.4th 1124 is distinguishable. See Roberts v. Packard, Packard & Johnson (2013) 217 Cal.App.4th 822. Further, this ruling is without prejudice for the prevailing party to file a motion for attorney fees at the conclusion of this action. Order signed. Judge: Suzanne Ramos Bolanos, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Reporter: Kelly Newton, CSR 13849 (Jan Brown & Associates, Tel: 415.981.3498) (501/SRB)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-27-2018 Continued To Dec-12-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION TO ADMIT COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE
Off Calendar Feb-07-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT FIRST AMERICAN TITLE INSURANCE TITLE COMPANY'S MOTION TO ADMIT RICHARD KREMEN AS COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE.

No appearances. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: GRANTED. Prevailing party to submit a proposed form of order. Judge: Ronald Quidachay, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported (501/REQ)

Defendants Kr 100 Hooper, Llc And Kilroy Realty, L.P.'S Motion To Strike Complaint
Off Calendar Jan-19-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Michael Selkirk (415-393-8225)/ Matthew S. Kahn (415-393-8212) for Plaintiff/ opposing party 100 Hooper Fee Owner.
Robert Moore (415-273-7465) for Defendant/Moving party KR 100 Hooper, LLC And Kilroy Realty, L.P.
Christy Curry (415-328-6644), CSR #13982 Court reporter.

The Court announces the tentative ruling. The matter is heard concurrently with the demurrer and the petition to compel arbitration. Argued re: clarification of tentative, dec relief/injunctive, and punitive damages. Plaintiff and defendant submits to the tentative ruling. (as fully reported in the reporter's notes) The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Defendants KR 100 Hooper, LLC And Kilroy Realty, L.P.'S Motion To Strike Complaintm is GRANTED with leave to amend to allege facts in support of request for punitive damages. Amended Complaint shall be filed upon conclusion of the arbitration and lifting of the stay per ruling on Defendant's motion to compel arbitration. Prevailing party to submit order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: A. Pascual, Christy Curry (415-328-6644), CSR #13982 Court reporter. (D501)

Defendants Kr 100 Hooper, Llc And Kilroy Realty, L.P.'S Petition To Compel Arbitration In The Alternative And Stay Proceedings
Off Calendar Feb-02-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Michael Selkirk (415-393-8225)/ Matthew S. Kahn (415-393-8212) for Plaintiff/ opposing party 100 Hooper Fee Owner.
Robert Moore (415-273-7465) for Defendant/Moving party KR 100 Hooper, LLC And Kilroy Realty, L.P.
Christy Curry (415-328-6644), CSR #13982 Court reporter.

The Court announces the tentative ruling. The matter is heard concurrently with the motion to strike and the demurrer. Argued re: clarification of days to initiate arbitration (20 days). (as fully reported in the reporter's notes) The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

Defendants KR 100 Hooper, LLC And Kilroy Realty, L.P.'S Petition To Compel Arbitration In The Alternative And Stay Proceedings is taken under submission. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: A. Pascual, Christy Curry (415-328-6644), CSR #13982 Court reporter. (D501)

Defendants Kr 100 Hooper, Llc And Kilroy Realty, L.P.'S Demurrer To Complaint
Off Calendar Jan-19-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Michael Selkirk (415-393-8225)/ Matthew S. Kahn (415-393-8212) for Plaintiff/ opposing party 100 Hooper Fee Owner.
Robert Moore (415-273-7465) for Defendant/Moving party KR 100 Hooper, LLC And Kilroy Realty, L.P.
Christy Curry (415-328-6644), CSR #13982 Court reporter.

The Court announces the tentative ruling. The matter is heard concurrently with the motion to strike and the petition to compel arbitration. Not argued. Plaintiff submits to the tentative ruling. (as fully reported in the reporter's notes) The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Defendants KR 100 Hooper, LLC And Kilroy Realty, L.P.'S Demurrer To Complaint is OVERRULED. Complaint is only in part based on the asserted potential violation of the "draw" provision. Each cause of action is in addition based on other breaches and disputes. It is improper to demur only to a part of a cause of action. Order signed in open court. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: A. Pascual, Christy Curry (415-328-6644), CSR #13982 Court reporter. (D501)
